code: import{useState}from'react';import{AuthenticatorType,getWebAuthnRequestOptionsForAuthentication,authenticateUsingWebAuthn}from'../lib/allauth';import Button from'../components/Button';import{parseRequestOptionsFromJSON,get}from'@github/webauthn-json/browser-ponyfill';import AuthenticateFlow from'./AuthenticateFlow';import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";export default function AuthenticateWebAuthn(props){const[response,setResponse]=useState({fetching:false,content:null});async function submit(){setResponse({...response,fetching:true});try{const optResp=await getWebAuthnRequestOptionsForAuthentication();const jsonOptions=optResp.data.request_options;const options=parseRequestOptionsFromJSON(jsonOptions);const credential=await get(options);const reauthResp=await authenticateUsingWebAuthn(credential);setResponse(r=>{return{...r,content:reauthResp};});}catch(e){console.error(e);window.alert(e);}setResponse(r=>{return{...r,fetching:false};});}return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(AuthenticateFlow,{authenticatorType:AuthenticatorType.WEBAUTHN,children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Button,{disabled:response.fetching,onClick:()=>submit(),children:"Use security key"})});}
